name: Remote Transmitter → Transmit Keeloq
description: This [action](https://esphome.io/automations/actions#all-actions) sends KeeLoq RF remote code to a remote transmitter.

config_entries.label: Address
config_entries.description: The 32-bit address to send, see dumper output for more info.

config_entries.label: Level
config_entries.description: Low battery level status bit. Defaults to false.

config_entries.label: Command
config_entries.description: The 4-bit command/button code to send, see dumper output for more info. Defaults to `0x10`.
